home.title: voto.vc — be represented
home.subtitle: Vote on real propositions from the Brazilian Congress and discover which representatives and parties align most with your values.
home.step1Desc: Select your state to see representatives from your region
home.step2Desc: Say whether you're for or against real proposals voted on in Congress
home.step3Desc: Discover which politicians and parties vote the way you would
home.dadosReaisDesc: Based on roll-call votes from the Chamber of Deputies and the Federal Senate
home.neutroDesc: No partisan bias. Open methodology and public source code
home.rapidoDesc: Answer in minutes. No account needed to see results

sobre.title: About — voto.vc
sobre.oQueEDesc: voto.vc helps Brazilian voters find the politicians and parties that best align with their views, based exclusively on public roll-call vote data from the Chamber of Deputies and the Federal Senate.
sobre.comoFunciona1: You answer real propositions that were voted on in Congress
sobre.comoFunciona2: We compare your answers with each representative's actual votes
sobre.comoFunciona3: We show you who votes most like you would
sobre.fontesDesc: voto.vc covers roll-call votes from the Chamber of Deputies and the Federal Senate, including historical data since 2003.
sobre.metodologiaDesc: The alignment metric measures how similarly a representative or party votes compared to you. Here's how it works in detail:
sobre.alinhamentoParlamentarDesc1: For each proposition that both you and the representative voted on, we compare the votes. Agreement (both YES or both NO) adds points; disagreement subtracts. The importance you assign to each vote (weight) is taken into account — votes you marked as more important weigh more in the calculation.
sobre.alinhamentoParlamentarDesc2: The result is normalized on a 0 to 100 scale, where 100 = total agreement, 50 = neutral, and 0 = total disagreement. Abstentions, absences, and votes marked as "Neutral" or "Skip" are ignored.
sobre.ajusteConfiancaDesc1: To prevent representatives with few votes in common from dominating the ranking, we apply a statistical adjustment to push results with few comparisons toward neutral. In practice, this means a representative needs several votes in common with you to achieve high or low alignment. The more votes in common, the more reliable the alignment.
sobre.ajusteConfiancaDesc2: The 5 dots displayed on your profile reflect this adjusted result — the same value used to sort the ranking.
sobre.alinhamentoPartidoDesc1: Parties are evaluated with a hybrid approach. First, we check if the party issued an official caucus orientation (YES, NO, or RELEASED) for the vote. If the orientation is RELEASED, the proposition is ignored for that party.
sobre.alinhamentoPartidoDesc2: When there is no official orientation, we use the majority vote of the party's representatives as an alternative — but only if at least 60% of members voted in the same direction. The weight of this majority vote is adjusted by unanimity (the more unanimous, the more weight).
sobre.classificacaoTemaDesc: Propositions are classified into topics by artificial intelligence based on each proposition's summary and description. The questionnaire selects propositions diversely across topics to cover the broadest possible spectrum of issues.
sobre.compromissoDesc: voto.vc has no party affiliation. The selection of propositions for the questionnaire seeks thematic diversity and relevance, not favoritism of any position.
sobre.quemSomosP1: We are Fabio Minati and Leo Dias, Brazilian engineers and friends since university. We chose to pursue our careers in different countries — but without ever leaving Brazil behind.
sobre.quemSomosP2: Even from afar, we remain deeply concerned about the country’s future. We believe a better Brazil depends on a more representative parliament and on voters who are informed and aware of the real impact of decisions made in Brasília.
sobre.quemSomosP3: This is how this project was born: a free, non-partisan website built on official data, designed to help Brazilians understand how members of Congress actually vote — not just what they say.
sobre.quemSomosP4: If this site helps even one person think more carefully before voting in the next elections, then all this effort will have been worthwhile.

privacidade.title: Privacy Policy — voto.vc
privacidade.resumoDesc: voto.vc is designed to work without collecting personal data. We don't require registration, don't use tracking cookies, and don't store your answers on our servers — unless you choose to share your profile.
privacidade.naoColetamos1: Name, email, or any personally identifiable information
privacidade.armazenamentoLocalDesc: Your questionnaire answers and selected state (UF) are stored exclusively in your browser (localStorage). This data is never automatically sent to our servers. You can delete it at any time by clearing your browser data.
privacidade.perfilCompartilhadoDesc: When you click "Share profile", a snapshot of your answers and results is saved on our server to generate a public URL. This snapshot includes:
privacidade.perfilCompartilhado1: Your answers to propositions (vote and weight)
privacidade.perfilCompartilhado2: The calculated representative and party ranking
privacidade.perfilCompartilhado3: An anonymized hash of your IP address (for abuse prevention)
privacidade.perfilCompartilhadoNota: Shared profiles are public — anyone with the link can view them. It is not possible to associate a shared profile with a specific person.
privacidade.calculoAlinhamentoDesc: When you view your profile, your answers are temporarily sent to the server to calculate alignment with representatives and parties. This data is processed in memory and is not stored.
privacidade.chatDesc: The chat feature uses artificial intelligence (Claude, by Anthropic) to answer questions about propositions. Messages are processed by the Anthropic API and are not stored by us. Rate limiting is done by IP address, but the IP is not permanently stored.
privacidade.terceiros1: AWS CloudFront as a CDN (may log standard access logs)
privacidade.terceiros2: Anthropic Claude API for chat (Anthropic's privacy policy applies to chat interactions)
privacidade.terceirosNota: We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, or any third-party tracking service.
privacidade.direitosDesc: Since we do not collect identifiable personal data, there is no personal data to access, correct, or delete. If you shared a profile and wish to remove it, please contact us.
privacidade.contatoDesc: For privacy questions, please reach out through the project's GitHub repository.
privacidade.alteracoesDesc: This policy may be updated periodically. Significant changes will be communicated on the site's main page.

contribuir.title: Contribute — voto.vc
contribuir.heroDesc: voto.vc is free, ad-free, and collects no personal data. Your contribution keeps the site running and helps those who need it most.
contribuir.doarSub: You will be redirected to the payment method
contribuir.comoFuncionaP1: All donations first cover the site's operational costs — AWS hosting and the Anthropic API for the AI chat feature.
contribuir.comoFuncionaP2: 100% of the surplus is donated monthly to Lar Casa Bela, an institution that shelters vulnerable children.
contribuir.comoFuncionaP3: We account for every cent. No exceptions.
contribuir.transparenciaDesc: Monthly closing. Cost receipts (AWS, Anthropic) and donation receipts available upon request.
contribuir.semDados: No data to display yet. The first report will be published after donations begin.
contribuir.larCasaBelaP1: Lar Casa Bela is a non-profit institution founded in 2012 by Isabel Simon, dedicated to the temporary foster care of children aged 0 to 6 referred by the Judiciary.
contribuir.larCasaBelaP2: Through its foster family program, children receive housing, meals, and care in a family environment while their biological families receive specialized support — with the goal of reunification or adoption.
contribuir.larCasaBelaP3: By contributing to voto.vc, you directly support Lar Casa Bela's work.
